sections.paragraph:
Original: מעון

Transliteration: mâ‛ôn

Phonetic: maw-ohn'

BDB Definition:

Maon or Maonites = "habitation"
  1. a man of Judah (noun proper masculine)
  2. the inhabitants of the city of Maon (noun proper masculine)
  3. a city of Judah located 8 miles south of Hebron (noun proper locative)

Origin: the same as H4583

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
